name: INCRMNTAL
description: AI-powered always-on incrementality measurement platform using natural budget fluctuations as micro-experiments.

seo.title: INCRMNTAL — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: INCRMNTAL: AI-powered always-on incrementality measurement platform using natural budget fluctuations as micro-experiments.

when_to_use: Always-on incrementality using natural budget fluctuations as experiments
Measuring true incremental installs without running manual holdout tests
Continuous marketing effectiveness measurement without pausing campaigns
AI-based incrementality for mobile growth teams seeking signal without control groups

pros: Uses natural budget changes as experiments
Low operational burden for marketing teams
Works across paid channels including mobile
cons: Methodology less transparent than classical tests
Not a replacement for MMP deterministic data
review.verdict: Smart always-on incrementality layer, but treat results as directional and keep an MMP underneath.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large advertisers wanting continuous incrementality signal without running holdouts.
review.not_for: Small teams with limited spend or those who distrust black-box causal methods.
